_meta.coverage_note: Top 10 raw signals from FIMI sources — unanalysed

items.title: EUvsDisinfo publishes new weekly review on pro-Kremlin disinformation trends
items.summary: EUvsDisinfo released its latest database update highlighting recurring pro-Kremlin narratives targeting EU policies. Relevant as it tracks ongoing FIMI operations from state-linked actors.

items.title: DFRLab reports on coordinated inauthentic behavior in Middle East elections
items.summary: Atlantic Council's DFRLab exposed a network of fake accounts amplifying divisive narratives ahead of regional votes. Highlights CIB linked to foreign influence.

items.title: EU DisinfoLab uncovers AI-generated deepfakes in Balkan media
items.summary: New report details use of AI tools for fabricating videos smearing political opponents. Pertinent to emerging cognitive warfare tactics.

items.title: Meta discloses removal of 5M accounts in CIB operation tied to China
items.summary: Meta's latest transparency report details takedown of networks pushing PRC-linked content on elections. Key platform enforcement against state influence.

items.title: Google TAG identifies Russian hacking group targeting election info
items.summary: Google Threat Analysis Group blog post on APT29 phishing campaigns against campaign staff. Relates to FIMI via info ops preceding interference.

items.title: Recorded Future reports Iranian influence network on X platform
items.summary: Insikt Group analysis reveals Tehran-backed accounts spreading anti-West narratives. Signals ongoing state FIMI efforts.

items.title: NewsGuard rates 20 new sites pushing climate disinformation
items.summary: NewsGuard updates reliability ratings for outlets tied to fossil fuel interests amplifying skeptic content. Civil society fact-checking action.

items.title: BBC Verify debunks viral video of fabricated protest footage
items.summary: BBC Verify analysis shows AI-altered clip falsely depicting UK riots, traced to foreign actors. Addresses FIMI operational signals.

items.title: Wired covers EU DSA fine against X for disinformation failures
items.summary: Article details first major DSA enforcement action penalizing platform moderation lapses. Regulatory development in FIMI space.

items.title: DFRLab follow-up on election deepfake research publication
items.summary: New DFRLab paper analyzes detection tools for audio deepfakes in 2026 campaigns. Advances research on cognitive warfare defenses.
